seasonal_maintenance.headline: Year-round enjoyment in {{state}}

comparison_guide.title: Traditional Chlorine vs. Salt-Water Systems for {{city}}

comparison.details: Chlorine is cheaper upfront for {{city}}. Salt systems near {{neighborhood}} provide softer water and lower long-term chemical costs in {{county}} without the red-eye irritation.

faqs.q: How often should I test my pool in {{city}}?
faqs.a: At least 2–3 times a week during {{state}} summers, or once weekly during winter in {{county}}.

faqs.q: Is salt water better for my skin in {{state}}?
faqs.a: Yes, salt generators maintain a constant, lower level of chlorine which is much softer on eyes and hair in {{city}}.
